summary: 针对选中的压缩机单元（compressor-4）生成参数修正提案，解决出口压力目标与吸入压力过于接近、以及最小流量旁通百分比低于防喘振阈值的两项诊断错误。

answers.text: 检测到压缩机-4存在两项参数配置问题：出口压力目标（275 kPa）与吸入压力（250 kPa）压差过小，无法满足压缩任务需求；最小流量旁通百分比（3%）低于当前防喘振审查阈值。建议调整这两个参数以恢复求解器有效性。

issues.message: Detail Review Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the requested compression duty.
Detail Review Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.

proposed_actions.title: 调整压缩机出口压力目标与最小流量旁通百分比
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前出口压力目标275 kPa仅比吸入压力250 kPa高25 kPa（压比约1.1），难以实现有效压缩；同时3%的最小流量旁通低于防喘振安全阈值。建议将出口压力目标提升至合理范围（如350 kPa，压比约1.4），并将最小流量旁通百分比提升至5%以满足审查要求。

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE
citations.excerpt: Detail Review Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the requested compression duty.

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW
citations.excerpt: Detail Review Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.
